title: hieracium dovrense subsp. dovrense
intro: Hieracium dovrense subsp. dovrense, also known as the Dovre Hawkweed or Dovre Hieracium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium dovrense subsp. dovrense include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
